changes.description: Create new SystemUnderstandingSection component (or equivalent) implementing Section 5 — three short blocks only: Block A (why results are grouped by system), Block B (what stable vs strain means), Block C (how markers connect to the bigger picture). Each block must anchor to real available data where present.
changes.root_cause: No Section 5 component exists (Glob against frontend/app/components/results/SystemUnderstanding*.tsx returned no results). The results/page.tsx currently renders sections 1–4 followed by trust/advanced sections with no system-comprehension bridging layer. The new component receives: balanced_systems_v1 (page.tsx:140, analysis.ts:235-239 — confirmed shape: intro_line, items[]{system_topic, evidence_line, capacity_note?}, context_line), clusters[] (page.tsx:138, analysis.ts:106-120 — confirmed fields: id?, cluster_id?, name?, biomarkers?[], severity?, score?, confidence?), primaryDriver (page.tsx:148 — type {id: string; name: string; biomarkers: string[]} | null, computed from clusters[]). Block A anchors to cluster names from clusters[].name (analysis.ts:109, nullable — fallback 'Health pattern' confirmed at page.tsx:424) — use 1-2 examples max, prioritising primaryDriver cluster. Block B anchors to balanced_systems_v1.items[].system_topic (analysis.ts:237) if present; otherwise falls back to general wording. Block C anchors to the existence of primaryDriver.name (page.tsx:148). All three fallback cases (1, 2, 3) must degrade gracefully: Case 3 renders all 3 blocks with general wording when clusters[] is empty, balanced_systems_v1 is null, and primaryDriver is null.
changes.scope_constraint: Component must contain exactly 3 blocks. Must not introduce a new backend DTO field. Must not reference phenotype labels, raw signal IDs, KB package content, or Gemini-generated text. Must null-check all three data sources before referencing them in rendered output. If all three data sources are absent/empty, all 3 blocks must still render using general (non-data-anchored) fallback wording per Case 3. Do not duplicate block labels or rendering logic from BalancedSystemsSummary or PrimaryFindingAndWhy.

changes.description: Insert the new Section 5 component into results/page.tsx after Section 4 (WhyThisLeadWonSection) and before the biomarker-heavy sections (ClusterSummary and BiomarkerDials). Pass props: balanced={balancedSystems}, clusters={clusters}, primaryDriver={primaryDriver}.
changes.root_cause: results/page.tsx currently has no Section 5 render. balancedSystems is already bound at page.tsx:140 (currentAnalysis?.balanced_systems_v1). clusters is already bound at page.tsx:138 (currentAnalysis?.clusters ?? []). primaryDriver is already computed at page.tsx:148 via useMemo from pickPrimaryDriverCluster(clusters). No new state, no new data fetching, no new hooks required — all props already available. Placement must be after WhyThisLeadWonSection JSX block (page.tsx:529-534) and before ClusterSummary (page.tsx:558-566) which is the first biomarker-heavy section. PipelineStatus (page.tsx:536-545) and InsightPanel (page.tsx:547-555) are trust/context strips that may precede or follow Section 5 at Cursor's discretion, but Section 5 must not appear after ClusterSummary.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not modify any existing section rendering, props, or logic. Do not add new state variables or data-fetching hooks to page.tsx. Only add: (1) the new component import, (2) a single new JSX section element in the correct position. All existing sections (1–4, trust strip, InsightPanel, ClusterSummary, BiomarkerDials, Advanced analysis) must be structurally identical after this change.

stop_conditions_verified: Do not introduce new backend DTO fields — explicitly out of scope (prompt lines 46-52); all data available at page.tsx:137-140,148
Do not touch backend/ssot/, backend/core/pipeline/, backend/core/analytics/ or backend scripts — not in scope
Do not use Gemini/LLM narrative generation — explicitly out of scope (prompt line 56)
Do not reference phenotype labels, internal signal IDs, raw biomarker_name identifiers, or Knowledge Bus raw content — acceptance criteria item 6
Do not fabricate examples or render broken placeholders when data is absent — fallback model (prompt lines 185-202) and acceptance criteria item 3
Do not rewrite or modify Sections 1–4 components — out of scope; acceptance criteria regression test
Do not create a standalone learn page or modal — out of scope (prompt line 54)
Do not create new shared libraries — component/architecture rules (prompt line 210)
Do not duplicate system or biomarker rendering logic — component/architecture rules (prompt line 212)
Do not create long-form educational content — Key principle 1 + acceptance criteria item 5
Section must contain exactly 3 blocks — required structure (prompt line 122)

BalancedSystemsSummary (Section 2) — must be unchanged at page.tsx:515-520

determinism_risks: NONE (analytical) — sprint is purely frontend presentation. No analytics logic, ranking, compiler, evaluator, or backend pipeline touched.

NULL SAFETY — all three props (balanced, clusters, primaryDriver) can be null/empty. All three blocks must render under Case 3 without throwing or rendering undefined values. Confirmed: balanced_systems_v1 is optional/null (analysis.ts:235), clusters defaults to [] (page.tsx:138), primaryDriver returns null when clusters empty (page.tsx:54).
CLUSTER NAME SELECTION — Block A must select 1-2 system names deterministically (e.g., primaryDriver first, then first cluster in array). No random selection permitted.
BALANCED SYSTEMS REFERENCE — Block B must null-check balanced?.items before indexing. If items empty or null, Block B must render in general wording mode without referencing a system topic.
NO TIME/RANDOM DEPENDENCY — component must be fully deterministic on input props. No Math.random(), no Date.now(), no non-deterministic selection logic.
behavioural_surface_area: frontend/app/components/results/SystemUnderstandingSection.tsx (new file) — three-block layout, data anchoring logic, fallback case handling per Cases 1/2/3

frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx — import of new component, new JSX section element inserted after WhyThisLeadWonSection (line 529) and before ClusterSummary (line 558), props: balanced={balancedSystems}, clusters={clusters}, primaryDriver={primaryDriver}
forbidden_fields_confirmed_absent: New backend DTO fields — none introduced; all props derive from existing currentAnalysis fields already mapped in page.tsx
phenotype — not in scope, not in new component
Knowledge Bus raw content — not in scope
raw signal names / internal IDs — excluded by stop condition; only human-readable cluster.name and system_topic values used
